---
title: "Oncologie"
---

## ESCO {#esco .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="esco">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.e-esco.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/esco.png" alt="ESCO">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.e-esco.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">ESCO</a>
<div class="outil-source">
European Society of Oncology Pharmacy
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## ESMO Guidelines {#esmo .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="esmo">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.esmo.org/guidelines" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/esmo.png" alt="ESMO Guidelines">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.esmo.org/guidelines" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">ESMO Guidelines</a>
<div class="outil-source">
European Society for Medical Oncology
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## SFPO {#sfpo .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="sfpo">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.sfpo.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/sfpo.png" alt="SFPO">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.sfpo.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SFPO</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société Française de Pharmacie Oncologique
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
